name: Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea
author: Poki
description: Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea is an idle/management game where you help the wandering Odysseus gather resources to return home. Arriving at an abandoned island alone, Odysseus embarks on an exciting adventure. Pick apples, chop trees, collect mushrooms, trade resources for money, and upgrade your tools. Explore the island and gather all the necessary resources. Finally, to restore the sea, you must battle the boss. Are you ready to become the hero of Odyssey? How to play Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea? Use the arrow keys, WASD, or click and drag with the mouse to move around! Who created Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea? Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea is created by Sergey Shmelev. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea for free? You can play Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea for free on Poki. Can I play Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea on mobile devices and desktop? Island Odyssey: Return of the Sea can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
